x-enumeration-literals.name: Commitment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records the underwriters commitment to subscribe to or guarantee a portion of a financial instrument or offering.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that assigns underwritten amounts to specific investors or accounts as part of the underwriting process.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Fee Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that applies or records fees earned by the underwriter for providing underwriting services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records commissions payable to parties involved in distributing the underwritten instrument.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies underwriting amounts, allocations, or terms due to changes in agreements or errors.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Settlement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that finalizes the underwriting process, including settlement of funds and delivery of securities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Underwriting Cancellation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that terminates the underwriters commitment or releases any unused allocated amounts.
